items.headline: Will Record Q2, Empower Deal and AI Infrastructure Demand Shift Analog Devices' (ADI) Narrative?
items.summary: In recent days, Analog Devices reported record fiscal second-quarter results, raised its guidance, completed the Empower Semiconductor acquisition, and highlighted rapidly growing AI data-center and communications revenues tied to robust infrastructure spending. The combination of easing interest-rate pressures and Analog Devices’ expanded role as an AI-infrastructure enabler has sharpened attention on how its power management and RF technologies underpin high-value data-center and...

items.headline: Wall Street Analysts See Analog Devices (ADI) as a Buy: Should You Invest?
